title: Job Opening Category Manager at Pilgrim International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Pilgrim International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Pilgrim International Enterprises invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pilgrim International Enterprises:
Pilgrim International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pilgrim International Enterprises!
